subcodes.first_line: This is what was revealed aforetime - verily, it is a momentous revelation. The sea of tribulation hath surged, and its waves have encompassed the Ark of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ما نزل من قبل انه لتنزیل عظیم قد ماج بحر البلاء و احاطت الامواج فلک الله
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action
